title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF DAVAO (SASA) AIRPORT IN DAVAO CITY TO FRANCISCO BANGOY AIRPORT IN HONOR OF THE LATE DON FRANCISCO BANGOY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2514 / 57 OG No. 5, 804 (January 30, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2762, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF DAVAO (SASA) AIRPORT IN DAVAO CITY TO FRANCISCO BANGOY AIRPORT IN HONOR OF THE LATE DON FRANCISCO BANGOY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In recognition of the philanthropic acts of the late Don Francisco Bangoy, the name of Davao (Sasa) Airport in Davao City is hereby changed to Francisco Bangoy Airport.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
